default_assumptions: Minimize upfront questions when intake is adequate.
Prefer production-ready templates over raw reference material.
Use reviewed good patterns when available; otherwise fall back to Template Design DNA.
fallback_rules: Do not use raw reference decks as production templates.
If graph or pattern artifacts are empty, select from production reference_catalog and template_design_dna.
If direction remains ambiguous, create a variant review deck before full production.
graph_query_strategy: retrieve by deck_type, purpose, tone, layout, and quality_label, then explain rejected candidates in reports
